segments.text: Do not keep silent, O God! Do not hold Your peace, And do not be still, O God!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For behold, Your enemies make a tumult; And those who hate You have lifted up their head.
They have taken crafty counsel against Your people, And consulted together against Your sheltered ones.
Come, and let us cut them off from being a nation, That the name of Israel may be remembered no more.
segments.speaker: Enemies of Israel

segments.text: For they have consulted together with one consent; They form a confederacy against You:
The tents of Edom and the Ishmaelites; Moab and the Hagrites;
Gebal, Ammon, and Amalek; Philistia with the inhabitants of Tyre;
Assyria also has joined with them; They have helped the children of Lot. Selah
Deal with them as with Midian, As with Sisera, As with Jabin at the Brook Kishon,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Who perished at En Dor, Who became as refuse on the earth.
Make their nobles like Oreb and like Zeeb, Yes, all their princes like Zebah and Zalmunna,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Let us take for ourselves The pastures of God for a possession.
segments.speaker: Enemies of Israel

segments.text: O my God, make them like the whirling dust, Like the chaff before the wind!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: As the fire burns the woods, And as the flame sets the mountains on fire,
So pursue them with Your tempest, And frighten them with Your storm.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Fill their faces with shame, That they may seek Your name, O Lord.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Let them be confounded and dismayed forever; Yes, let them be put to shame and perish,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: That they may know that You, whose name alone is the Lord, Are the Most High over all the earth.
segments.speaker: David
